name: BYND Cannasoft Enterprises Inc. Common Stock
summary: BYND Cannasoft Enterprises Inc. is an Israeli-based software company specializing in CRM (customer relationship management) solutions for the cannabis industry. The company develops and markets proprietary CRM software products, primarily focusing on micro-groweries and retail dispensaries, offering tools for managing customer interactions, sales, and compliance. The company is also exploring opportunities in medical cannabis-related technologies.
